title: chamaeraphis italica var. germanica
intro: Chamaeraphis italica var. germanica, commonly known as German chamomile, is an annual plant of the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of German chamomile include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia, digestive issues, and skin irritations. German chamomile is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, and can also be found in topical creams and ointments for skin care.
